name_en: M23640 Full Leather Embossed Square Bag Collection New Fall/Winter ONTHEGO EAST WEST Handbag M23698 This OnTheGo East West handbag reinterprets the East West spacious structure with the OnTheGo small tote design, using Monogram Empreinte leather. Giant Monogram is embossed on the body, and the neat interior can hold daily essentials. Top handles and a detachable leather chain strap allow for multiple carrying ways. 25 x 13 x 10 cm.
